[Solsector] FarFarOut is farther than FarOut, although FarOut is still quite far out there, and FarOut is probably farther out than FarFarout when looking at semi-major axis. FarFarOut might still be farther on semi-major axis because of how far the uncertainty parameter over how far it goes out is.
[Solsector] Space is kinda big, but feel free to stop off at the next star system for groceries.
[Solsector] The sales + import tax combo that every faction does is highly simplistic, regressive, and probably why the sector is going to hell.
